chapter_title.ar: باب صِفَةِ الْغُسْلِ وَ الْوُضُوءِ قَبْلَهُ وَ بَعْدَهُ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَغْتَسِلُ فِي مَكَانٍ غَيْرِ طَيِّبٍ وَ مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ وَ تَحْوِيلِ الْخَاتَمِ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – Description of the washing, and the Ablution (Wudhu) before it and after it, and the man washing in a place other than good, and what is to be said during the washing, and turning of the ring during the washing

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/137)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ الْوُضُوءُ بَعْدَ الْغُسْلِ بِدْعَةٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Shazaan Bin Al Khaleel, from Yunus, from Yahya Bin Talha, from his brother,
(It has been narrated) from Abdullah Bin Suleyman who said, ‘I hear Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘The Ablution (Wudhu) after the washing is an innovation’.
en.sarwar: 12. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Shadhan ibn al-Khalil from Yunus from Yahya ibn Talhah from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sulayman who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘Wudu’ after Ghusl (bath) is heresy.’”
